name: nikitakramar
title: Nikita Context Protocol
description: A source-backed context protocol for preparing a better conversation without impersonation.
proof: The page separates Observed, Inference, Unknowns, and guardrails.
The cockpit compiles sourced prep packets for conversation intents including WWNKD.
The site exposes llms.txt, ncp.json, context-pack.json, claims.json, and sources.json.
